lighting.time_of_day: dual-mode: golden-hour daylight OR nighttime neon festival
lighting.key_light: split approach: natural sun 45° high-angle for daytime / multi-source colored LED stage wash for night. Hard directional in both cases
lighting.fill_light: complementary color ambient fill — if key is warm (orange/gold), fill is cool cyan/teal at 40% intensity. If key is cool (blue/purple), fill is warm magenta/amber
lighting.shadow_character: hard dramatic shadows with luminous color spill — shadows are never neutral black, they carry cyan or magenta cast

palette.ratio: 50/40/10 warm-cool-accent, often split-toned left-to-right or top-to-bottom
palette.saturation: ultra-saturated — vibrance +80, saturation +60 in post, no neutral midtones

subject_framing.subject_width_pct: 40-65% for portraits, 15-25% for festival/cosmic wide shots
subject_framing.subject_position: dead center or upper-center — strong axial symmetry, rule-of-thirds rarely used
subject_framing.subject_gaze: direct-camera with intense eye contact (55%) / eyes-closed in trance ecstasy (30%) / looking-up toward light/cosmos (15%)
subject_framing.crop_style: tight portrait chest-up for faces, wide establishing for festival scenes — avoid mid-range waist shots

scene_depth.foreground: primary subject (face, body, mystical figure) with sharp focus OR geometric overlay (mandala, sacred geometry) at 30% opacity blend mode
scene_depth.midground: subject if not foreground, OR festival crowd in motion blur, OR psychedelic pattern field
scene_depth.background: radial light burst / festival stage with LED panels / cosmic starfield / fractal geometry explosion — always highly detailed, never flat bokeh
scene_depth.atmospheric_effect: layered particles — dust motes + lens flare + light rays (god rays at 15° angle) + floating embers/sparkles. Present in 27/30 thumbnails

shock_element.description: complementary color clash at maximum saturation — orange subject against cyan background, or magenta-lit face against green/teal field. Creates retinal vibration effect that stops mid-scroll
shock_element.frequency: 24/30 thumbnails use extreme warm-vs-cool contrast as primary shock element. Secondary: glowing/heterochromatic eyes (18/30), tribal face paint/body art (16/30), impossible scale or surreal elements (12/30)

anti_patterns: Monochromatic or analogous color schemes — this genre demands complementary color warfare
Negative space or minimalist composition — every pixel must carry visual information, maximalism is law
Natural skin tones or realistic color grading — faces are teal, orange, magenta, never neutral beige
Rule-of-thirds off-center framing — subjects are centered for shamanic/portal effect, symmetry dominates
Soft dreamy bokeh backgrounds — backgrounds must have structure (geometry, patterns, cosmic detail), never smooth gradients alone
prompt_preamble: Center-framed portrait shot with perfect axial symmetry, subject occupying 50% of frame width. Shot on 85mm f/1.4 lens with subject in sharp focus, background at f/2.8 equivalent for detail retention. Extreme split-tone color grading: key light is warm (#FF6B35 festival-orange or #FFD700 golden amber) from 45° above right, fill light is cool (#00CED1 electric cyan or #6A0DAD deep purple) from opposite side at 40% intensity, creating hard directional shadows with colored spill — no neutral blacks. Ultra-saturated complementary color clash (vibrance +80) between warm and cool zones to create retinal vibration effect. Subject's eyes are enhanced focal point with catch-light or subtle glow. Atmospheric depth: foreground has subtle geometric sacred geometry overlay at 25% opacity blend mode, midground sharp subject, background detailed with radial light burst or fractal pattern field (never smooth bokeh). Layered particle atmosphere: fine dust motes + god rays at 12° angle + floating embers + lens flare, all color-tinted to match split-tone palette. Tribal/ethnic aesthetic: face paint, indigenous features, dreadlocks, or mystical adornments. Mood is ecstatic trance state, either direct intense eye contact or eyes closed in bliss. Festival or cosmic context subtly present. Maximalist composition — pack the frame with color and detail, avoid empty space. Photorealistic render with psychedelic post-grade.
